title: Temenos Payment Order
description: Schema for Temenos payment orders including domestic transfers, international SWIFT payments, SEPA credit transfers, and internal account transfers with full ISO 20022 support.

paymentOrderId.description: Unique payment order identifier assigned by the system

debitAccountId.description: Identifier of the originating debit account

creditAccountId.description: Identifier of the destination credit account for internal transfers

amount.description: Payment amount in the specified currency

paymentType.description: Classification of the payment type determining the clearing channel

status.description: Current processing status of the payment order

valueDate.description: Requested value date for the payment

executionDate.description: Actual execution date when the payment was processed

reference.description: Payment reference provided by the originator

endToEndId.description: End-to-end identifier for ISO 20022 payment tracking

chargeBearer.description: Charge allocation between originator and beneficiary

failureReason.description: Reason for payment failure if applicable

createdDate.description: Timestamp when the payment order was created

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp of the last status update

accountNumber.description: Beneficiary account number for non-IBAN payments

country.description: Beneficiary country in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format
